name: deck-tools
description: Claude Code plugins for turning live web apps into polished training/demo decks.

plugins.name: cap-app-to-pptx
plugins.description: Build full-bleed PowerPoint training/demo decks from a LIVE web app: capture real UI screenshots via headless Chrome (inject session to skip login, force light mode, open modals/tabs, read element coordinates for crisp callouts), render HTML/CSS design slides to PNG, and assemble everything as full-bleed picture slides in a .pptx.
